infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID or your device passcode to unlock sober-house records.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sober AI uses your location while the app is open to show nearby meetings, estimate distance, and confirm arrival when you start attendance.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Sober AI adds recovery events to your calendar, such as meetings, sober house obligations, and one-on-one sessions, so you receive reminders and stay on schedule. For example, when you tap 'Add to Calendar' on a meeting, Sober AI saves that meeting to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Sober AI adds recovery events to your calendar, such as meetings, sober house obligations, and one-on-one sessions, so you receive reminders and stay on schedule. For example, when you tap 'Add to Calendar' on a meeting, Sober AI saves that meeting to your calendar.
